label: Midnight Bar
description: Late-night, low-lit visual direction for cocktail bars, wine bars, speakeasies and dinner-only venues that open after dark. Near-black backgrounds with brushed-brass accents, tight letter-spacing on the display face and minimal radii evoke marble counters, amber bottles and a candle on every table. Intentionally restrained motion so the dimness reads as confidence rather than as a missing-asset glitch.
